states.name: Dark Jeanne
states.title: Maiden of Darkness
states.description:
She was the hero of her country. She was a saint to all the Followers of Light - until the very people who adored her betrayed her and condemned her to death.

Now, she rises again from the ashes. Her banner flies high, no longer a symbol of light, but of darkness.

states.name: Dark Jeanne
states.title: Maiden of Darkness
states.description: As the flames charred her sister's flesh, Mikaela couldn't block out the screams and the sounds of agony. She did what she had to do, what any sister would do for her sibling. But she could not have anticipated the true cost of her actions.

states.name: Dark Jeanne
states.title: Maiden of Darkness
states.description:
In another world, life seems different for the twin sisters. In this peaceful world, they go to school, participate in extracurricular activites, and live normal lives.

However, each world in the multiverse is governed by the same law: a constant cycle between life and death. In this world, just as in Erden, peace is only a transitory state. For the twin sisters, the blissful years of high school will soon descend into total chaos.
